text: As I wander through this sleek, quiet space, I am struck by a sense of anticipation—an undercurrent of curiosity. The glass walls and organized surroundings evoke a modern, utilitarian comfort. Moving closer to the vivid R+D exhibit, I am drawn in by the vibrant colors and the words about human connection with technology. Adrift in this fusion of art and intellect, I feel both the weight and thrill of progress. Here, surrounded by humanity's questions and innovations, I sense that I am part of a much larger conversation, and I am eager to listen.
